The '''gornalak''' was a [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Taraloon]]. They inhabited the caves and tunnels of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Being at the top of the native food chain, they had no natural predators—maybe with the exception of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Chillo Sanpona]] who hunted Gornalak for sports.<ref name="SD" />
